{{Quote|<s></s>''Scourge One'' to base…We have ''Skywalker'' and ''Solusar''…We're going in!|The ''Scourage One'' locates [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Kam Solusar]]|<ref name="World of the Ancient Sith" />}}
'''''Scourge One''''' was an [[Imperial hunter (starship)|Imperial hunter]], a model of long-range intercept [[Starship/Legends|starship]] developed for use by the [[Dark Empire]]. It was [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Vill Goir]], a member of the [[Dark Side Elite]]. During [[Operation Shadow Hand]], it transported Goir and fellow [[Dark side adept/Legends|Dark Side Adept]] [[Executor (Imperial rank)|Executor]] [[Sedriss QL]], along with several [[Squad/Legends|squads]] of [[darktrooper]]s, to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].
